headline: Fabrinet Rides on Automation Boom: A Case for More Upside?
summary: FN rides automation and AI demand as optical and non-optical revenue surge, with Q4 revenues guided at #1.25B-$1.29B. Telecom up 55% and DCI up 90%.

headline: TE CONNECTIVITY PLC (NYSE:TEL): A High-Quality Dividend Stock to Consider for Sustainable Income and Growth
summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) offers a strong dividend, solid profitability, and excellent financial health. With a sustainable 1.51% yield and 7.55% annual growth, it's a top stock for reliable income investors.
